name: Trickstar Narkissus
name_jp: トリックスター・ナルキッス
desc: If your opponent takes effect damage (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Trickstar Narkissus" once per turn. Each time your opponent activates a monster effect in their hand or GY, inflict 200 damage to them immediately after it resolves.
mnst_eff: If your opponent takes effect damage (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Trickstar Narkissus" once per turn. Each time your opponent activates a monster effect in their hand or GY, inflict 200 damage to them immediately after it resolves.
eff: If your opponent takes effect damage (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Trickstar Narkissus" once per turn. Each time your opponent activates a monster effect in their hand or GY, inflict 200 damage to them immediately after it resolves.

action: Activates if your opponent takes effect damage
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
